heading: Election of plan status
label: 1453 Election of plan status
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in subsecs. (a) and (b)(1), was in the original “this Act”, meaning , known as the Employee Retirement Income Security Act of 1974. Titles I, III, and IV of such Act are classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. children.text: the plan was not a multiemployer plan because the plan was not a plan described in and (as such provisions were in effect on the day before ); andsection 1002(37)(A)(iii) of this titlesection 414(f)(1)(C) of title 26September 26, 1980
the plan had been identified as a plan that was not a multiemployer plan in substantially all its filings with the corporation, the Secretary of Labor and the Secretary of the Treasury.
the plan is amended to provide that it shall not be treated as a multiemployer plan for all purposes under this chapter and the Internal Revenue Code of 1954, and
written notice of the amendment is provided to the corporation within 60 days after the amendment is adopted.

children.heading: Effective date
children.label: c Effective date
children.text: An election described in subsection (a) shall be treated as being effective as of .September 26, 1980
